calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Scott A. Gursky, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Flexible Funding Ltd. Liability Co.
John Villanueva, Director of Account Services for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No apearance by defendants Neuselogix Staffing Solutions, LLC, Gary Sowder, individually and dba Nurselogix Staffing Solutions or James Sowder, individually and dba Nurselogix Staffing Solutions.
Defaults were entered against defendants on April 11, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Flexible Funding Ltd. Liability Co., and against the Defaulted Defendants Neuselogix Staffing Solutions, LLC, Gary Sowder, individually and dba Nurselogix Staffing Solutions and James Sowder, individually and dba Nurselogix Staffing Solutions as follows:

Damages/Principal - $18,819.65.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,347.84.
Attorney's Fees - $4,550.00.
Punitive Damages - $100,000.00.
Costs - $1,651.15, for a total of $127,358.64.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2008 Continued To Aug-22-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
